model.description: MiMo • The flagship foundation for the agentic era, built for complex, long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks.

pick.rationale: Purdue's elite offensive efficiency (rank 1-2 nationally) presents a significant challenge for Gonzaga's defense, and the Boilermakers' experience in the Big Ten and tournament-tested roster under Matt Painter provide crucial advantages. While Gonzaga has a strong defensive profile (rank 9) and a 30-3 record, their weaker offensive efficiency (rank 30-37) and the absence of star forward Braden Huff due to a knee injury substantially limit their scoring firepower. Purdue's overall talent depth and ability to control tempo should prove decisive in this competitive Sweet 16 matchup.

reasoningStep.title: Gonzaga vs Purdue Sweet 16 Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Purdue's elite offense vs Gonzaga's elite defense, with Gonzaga missing key player Braden Huff.
evidence: Purdue ranks 8th in both KenPom and Torvik with elite offensive efficiency (rank 1-2) but weaker defense (rank 36).
Gonzaga ranks 11th in both KenPom and Torvik with elite defensive efficiency (rank 9) but weaker offense (rank 30-37).
Gonzaga is missing star forward Braden Huff due to a knee injury, which was noted in their first-round game against Kennesaw State.
Purdue has a 26-8 record from the competitive Big Ten conference, while Gonzaga has a 30-3 record from the WCC.
The matchup features Purdue's offensive firepower against Gonzaga's defensive prowess, but Gonzaga's injury concerns and offensive limitations give Purdue the edge.

After my fellow analysts and I have the privilege of calling the SEC championship game in Nashville, Tennessee, we move swiftly to process the men's NCAA tournament field as it is revealed. Our bosses at ESPN ask us each to fill out a bracket -- while we are on the air -- so we can reveal our picks before the end of the show. They give us less than five minutes. Hardly ideal, but perhaps our first instincts are better than considered thought. I decided that I would give you more than five minutes so you can dazzle your friends and win your office poo

result.text: Purdue vs. Gonzaga Prediction, Odds, Picks - NCAA Tournament Sweet 16 | FOX Sports my favs Access and manage your favorites here DISMISS Scores Watch Betting FOX Super 6 💰 Stories Search Sign In Account SPORTS & TEAMS PLAYERS SHOWS PERSONALITIES TOPICS POPULAR SEARCHES - No Data Available - BROWSE BY SPORTS & TEAMS PLAYERS SHOWS PERSONALITIES TOPICS Built on Purdue vs. Gonzaga Prediction, Odds, Picks - NCAA Tournament Sweet 16 Updated Mar. 29, 2024 8:27 p.m. ET share facebook x reddit link Data Skrive A Sweet 16 matchup will feature the No. 1 seed Purdue Boilermakers (31-4) and the No. 5 seed Gonzaga Bulldogs (27-7) playing on Friday at Little Caesars Arena. The NCAA Tournament contest tips off at 7:39 PM ET. The Boilermakers enter their matchup against the Bulldogs as a 4.5-point favorite. The matchup features an over/under of 155.5. Continue reading to get everything you need to know before placing bets on the Purdue-Gonzaga clash. Purdue vs. Gonzaga Game Information & Odds When: Friday, March 29, 2024 at 7:39 PM ET Where: Little Caesars Arena in Detroit, Michigan How to Watch on TV: TBS Live boxscore on FOX Sports Boilermakers vs Bulldogs Betting Information Favorite Spread Favorite Spread Odds Underdog Spread Odds Total Over Total Odds Under Total Odds Favorite Moneyline Underdog Moneyline Boilermakers -4.5 -108 -112 155.5 -112 -108 -198 +164 Purdue vs. Gonzaga Prediction Pick ATS: Gonzaga (+4.5) Pick OU: Under (155.5) Prediction: Purdue 78, Gonzaga 75 Learn more about the Purdue Boilermakers vs. the Gonzaga Bulldogs game on FOX Sports! Purdue vs. Gonzaga Betting Insights Betting Line Implied Predictions Based on the spread and over/under, the implied score for the matchup is Boilermakers 80, Bulldogs 76. The Boilermakers have a 66.4% chance to claim victory in this contest per the moneyline's implied probability. The Bulldogs have a 37.9% implied probability to come out on top. Key Spread Facts Purdue is 15-14-2 ATS this season. Gonzaga is 15-16-0 ATS this year. Purdue has covered the spread 12 times this season (12-14-1 ATS) when playing as at least 4.5-point favorites. Gonzaga has covered the spread once when an underdog by 4.5 points or more this season (in two opportunities). Key Total Facts Boilermakers games have finished with more than 155.5 points 12 times so far this year. Bulldogs games have gone over 155.5 points on 13 occasions this year. These teams score 168.9 points per game combined, higher than the over/under for this matchup by 13.4. Key Moneyline Facts Purdue has been the moneyline favorite 25 times this season. They've finished 21-4 in those games. This season, Gonzaga has won two out of the four games in which it has been the underdog. Purdue has a record of 19-4 when it has played as a moneyline favorite with odds of -198 or shorter (winning 82.6%). Gonzaga has played as an underdog of +164 or more once this season and lost that game. Purdue vs. Gonzaga: Recent Results Boilermakers vs Bulldogs Recent Games Date Favorit

You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.

result.text: Purdue vs. Gonzaga Prediction, Odds, Picks - NCAA Tournament Sweet 16 | FOX Sports my favs Access and manage your favorites here DISMISS Scores Watch Betting FOX Super 6 💰 Stories Search Sign In Account SPORTS & TEAMS PLAYERS SHOWS PERSONALITIES TOPICS POPULAR SEARCHES - No Data Available - BROWSE BY SPORTS & TEAMS PLAYERS SHOWS PERSONALITIES TOPICS Built on Purdue vs. Gonzaga Prediction, Odds, Picks - NCAA Tournament Sweet 16 Updated Mar. 29, 2024 8:27 p.m. ET share facebook x reddit link Data Skrive A Sweet 16 matchup will feature the No. 1 seed Purdue Boilermakers (31-4) and the No. 5 seed Gonzaga Bulldogs (27-7) playing on Friday at Little Caesars Arena. The NCAA Tournament contest tips off at 7:39 PM ET. The Boilermakers enter their matchup against the Bulldogs as a 4.5-point favorite. The matchup features an over/under of 155.5. Continue reading to get everything you need to know before placing bets on the Purdue-Gonzaga clash. Purdue vs. Gonzaga Game Information & Odds When: Friday, March 29, 2024 at 7:39 PM ET Where: Little Caesars Arena in Detroit, Michigan How to Watch on TV: TBS Live boxscore on FOX Sports Boilermakers vs Bulldogs Betting Information Favorite Spread Favorite Spread Odds Underdog Spread Odds Total Over Total Odds Under Total Odds Favorite Moneyline Underdog Moneyline Boilermakers -4.5 -108 -112 155.5 -112 -108 -198 +164 Purdue vs. Gonzaga Prediction Pick ATS: Gonzaga (+4.5) Pick OU: Under (155.5) Prediction: Purdue 78, Gonzaga 75 Learn more about the Purdue Boilermakers vs. the Gonzaga Bulldogs game on FOX Sports! Purdue vs. Gonzaga Betting Insights Betting Line Implied Predictions Based on the spread and over/under, the implied score for the matchup is Boilermakers 80, Bulldogs 76. The Boilermakers have a 66.4% chance to claim victory in this contest per the moneyline's implied probability. The Bulldogs have a 37.9% implied probability to come out on top. Key Spread Facts Purdue is 15-14-2 ATS this season. Gonzaga is 15-16-0 ATS this year. Purdue has covered the spread 12 times this season (12-14-1 ATS) when playing as at least 4.5-point favorites. Gonzaga has covered the spread once when an underdog by 4.5 points or more this season (in two opportunities). Key Total Facts Boilermakers games have finished with more than 155.5 points 12 times so far this year. Bulldogs games have gone over 155.5 points on 13 occasions this year. These teams score 168.9 points per game combined, higher than the over/under for this matchup by 13.4. Key Moneyline Facts Purdue has been the moneyline favorite 25 times this season. They've finished 21-4 in those games. This season, Gonzaga has won two out of the four games in which it has been the underdog. Purdue has a record of 19-4 when it has played as a moneyline favorite with odds of -198 or shorter (winning 82.6%). Gonzaga has played as an underdog of +164 or more once this season and lost that game. Purdue vs. Gonzaga: Recent Results Boilermakers vs Bulldogs Recent Games Date Favorit
